paper_result: Development AUROC 0.691 on COVID-19 Sounds and 0.668 on Coswara; postdevelopment AUROC 0.607 and 0.597.
limitation_or_future_work: Explicitly targets temporal drift; notes Coswara adaptation was less consistent due changing prevalence, symptoms, age/gender biases; UDA assumes source-target similarity and AL needs reliable labels.
what_we_did: Built time-stratified and strict early-to-late temporal evaluations; monthly label/covariate shift tables; temporal month causal audit; uncertainty under shift; final ComParE+IS10 temporal stress test.
remaining_gap: Did not implement UDA or active learning; did not validate newer variants with prospective deployment data.
primary_source: P1_jmir_drift_adaptive.pdf/text lines around Discussion and Principal Findings.

paper_result: BLSTM COVID/non-COVID classifier reported AUC 91.5% with subgroup bias/fairness analyses.
limitation_or_future_work: Future extension: enlarge subject count and increase diversity across demographics, gender, age, and health conditions; metadata can expose bias.
what_we_did: Used Coswara as source dataset; participant-level splits; quality audit; metadata confounding; temporal/month shift; subgroup and residual SMD analyses.
remaining_gap: Did not collect new subjects or improve demographic diversity; dataset limitations remain inherited.

paper_result: Dataset paper; cough detector ROC area 0.97; expert diagnosis agreement poor (Fleiss kappa about 0.0031).
limitation_or_future_work: COUGHVID labels are noisy; private test set for independent evaluation; metadata such as age/gender may be needed as context.
coverage: Covered for external stress / partially for label noise
what_we_did: Ran final Coswara-to-COUGHVID external transfer on 8,331 cough samples; also earlier COUGHVID internal baselines for MFCC/eGeMAPS/BEATs/PANNs.
remaining_gap: Did not use private COUGHVID evaluator; did not repair expert-label noise; external transfer remains weak.
primary_source: P4_coughvid_arxiv_2009.11644 text Technical Validation/Inter-Rater Reliability/Private Set.

paper_result: Audio ROC-AUC 0.846 before matching; after matching on symptoms/demographics ROC-AUC about 0.619; symptoms often outperform audio in replication.
limitation_or_future_work: Recommends metadata dissemination, recruitment-bias control, matching, targeted test sets, expected utility, and out-of-study replication.
what_we_did: Metadata-only classifiers, IPW-controlled audio evaluation, residual SMD tables, matched temporal cohort, external COUGHVID transfer, calibration and operating-point reports.
remaining_gap: Residual unmeasured confounding remains possible; no randomized/prospective cohort.

paper_result: ENCL-DNN AUROC 0.834 on Coswara and 0.854 on Cambridge; ECE improved from 0.178 to 0.089 on Coswara.
limitation_or_future_work: Emphasizes reliable probability calibration and uncertainty, not only AUROC.
what_we_did: Every model bundle reports Brier, ECE, NLL; calibration-under-shift and prevalence recalibration analyses included.
remaining_gap: Did not implement ENCL-DNN itself; external probabilities still poorly calibrated without prevalence correction.

paper_result: Reports over 90% AUC for COVID detection; HST outperforms CNN/RNN/transformer baselines on Cambridge/COUGHVID tasks.
limitation_or_future_work: Not a diagnostic test; future work should compare with antigen tests, support mobile/cloud deployment, standardize recording procedures, validate broader cohorts/diseases, and add explanation/uncertainty.
what_we_did: Included deep spectrogram/CNN branches, SSL WavLM attempt, multimodal cough/breath/speech fusion, temporal/external validation, and uncertainty/calibration tables.
remaining_gap: Did not reproduce HST architecture; no mobile/cloud implementation; no antigen-test comparison; no broad multi-disease cohort.

paper_result: Accuracy 89.30%, AUROC 94.74%, PR 91.62% using symptom-assisted attention.
limitation_or_future_work: Acknowledges confounders age/gender/symptoms; future work: other respiratory diseases and additional multimodal data.
what_we_did: Used symptoms as confounding/audit variables rather than as diagnostic input; quantified symptoms-only AUROC 0.932 to show risk of shortcut learning.
remaining_gap: Did not build symptom-assisted classifier; no multi-disease validation.

paper_result: RF with ANOVA-selected OpenSMILE features reported accuracies 76.47%, 75.54%, and 75.54% for vowels /a/, /e/, /o/.
limitation_or_future_work: Handcrafted OpenSMILE only; performance sensitive to feature selection; future deep end-to-end, larger/diverse speech samples, optimization, XAI.
what_we_did: Added OpenSMILE ComParE2016 + IS10; LightGBM feature ranking top-800; paper-comparable speech 10-fold CV AUROC 0.806; feature selection tables.
remaining_gap: Did not train raw-audio end-to-end speech model to completion; no XAI beyond feature attribution.

paper_result: Strategy 5 reports DNDF AUC 0.92 on Coswara, 0.93 on COUGHVID, 0.97-0.99 on other settings; combined dataset AUC/accuracy about 0.97.
limitation_or_future_work: Limitations include threshold-moving clinical mismatch, no temporal validation on newer variants, no deployable healthcare evaluation, no cough-specific subtype annotations; future calibration, interpretability, external stability, multi-class disease classification.
what_we_did: Adopted feature selection, SMOTE model bank, threshold tuning, cross-dataset transfer, calibration metrics, final temporal validation, and external stability evidence; did not copy DNDT/DNDF.
remaining_gap: Did not beat their internal AUCs; did not implement DNDT/DNDF; no multi-class disease task; no clinical deployment.

paper_result: Methodology/review style evidence for respiratory screening pipeline concerns.
limitation_or_future_work: Calls for subgroup robustness/fairness, mobile noise/microphone variability, device-invariant features, domain adaptation, external validation, nested/repeated subject-level evaluation, and ablations.
what_we_did: Quality audit, domain-shift audit, CORAL baseline, external COUGHVID validation, paper-comparable CV, temporal validation, ablation summaries.
remaining_gap: No device-invariant learned representation that fixes transfer; no full formal ablation of every preprocessing component.

paper_result: Reports prior related works with cough AUC up to 0.98, breath 0.94, speech 0.92; its own texture analysis reaches high binary cough accuracy in a controlled setting.
limitation_or_future_work: States method is not standalone diagnostic; more data/classes and variant/asymptomatic coverage are needed.
what_we_did: Multimodal cough/breath/speech, broad acoustic descriptors, external transfer, temporal shift; we avoided standalone diagnostic claim.
remaining_gap: No new controlled clinical collection; no multi-class respiratory disease extension.

paper: Audio feature ranking for COVID respiratory audio, 2021
paper_result: Feature ranking improved accuracy up to 17% on Cambridge and 10% on Coswara; 88% and 77% accuracy reported.
limitation_or_future_work: Future: regularize different sample lengths and identify informative features for deep architectures; generalize to other respiratory diseases.
what_we_did: Implemented LightGBM/ExtraTrees/univariate selection, top-k ComParE+IS10, feature importance/selection artifacts, model-bank comparisons.
remaining_gap: Did not solve variable-length modeling with a dedicated event architecture; no other respiratory diseases.

paper_result: ResNet50 AUC 0.98 on Coswara; LSTM transfer to Sarcos improved from AUC 0.779 to 0.938/0.94 after SFS.
limitation_or_future_work: Requires more stringent validation on larger data and regulatory approval; future: enlarge dataset, transfer learning, smartphone implementation.
what_we_did: External validation and feature selection were performed; no regulatory/deployment claim made.
remaining_gap: Did not reach 0.98; no regulatory-grade validation; no smartphone deployment.
